arts.ttl: Christian Pulisic suggests 'racism' against Americans in Europe
arts.sum: According to what the player told the Paramount+ documentary series that bears his surname as its title, there is serious discrimination against American footballers in foreign leagues (not only in Italy): "I don't want him to take my place here," was one of the phrases that Pulisic shared about how he was received by his teammates, who did not like having him in the squad . T here are few times when an American player finds a place in one of the elite soccer leagues in Europe, especially in their prime, and there are few, compared to the large number of players from many different countries who come to a club in MLS, which is becoming a Tower of Babel .

arts.ttl: Why Christian Pulisic Isn't Playing for AC Milan in the Champions League vs. Crvena zvezda
arts.sum: The Rossoneri will be without Captain America until potentially January after he picked up an injury in Serie A.

arts.ttl: Why isn't Christian Pulisic playing for AC Milan against Crvena zvezda?
arts.sum: As well as the visit of Crvena zvezda, Pulisic looks set to miss an important clash against Roma on December 29. A victory against Crvena zvezda would set Milan up well in Europe with two winnable games against Girona (home) and Dinamo Zagreb (away) to follow.

arts.ttl: Sandro Tonali: More playing time with Italy than Newcastle sparks Milan return rumours
arts.sum: Sandro Tonali's role at Newcastle United has come under scrutiny as the Italian midfielder finds himself playing more minutes for his national team than for his club.
